summary: Iteration 2 testing of SAW benefit/cost differentiation. Backend (25 pytest tests; 24 pass, 1 unrelated seed-state failure on positions count). Added 3 new SAW-specific tests covering /api/saw/info schema, ranking breakdown structure, and mathematical benefit/cost normalization correctness — all PASS. Frontend RankingView verified end-to-end with HR login: formula cards, 6-row criteria table (total=100%), matrix toggle (raw→normalized→weighted), breakdown dialog with x/r/w/v columns, and Nilai SAW panel benefit/cost badges. Math verified: Ahmad's pendidikan raw=85, normalized=1.000, weighted=0.200 (=0.20·1.0); usia COST normalized=0.8333 (=min75/90), weighted=0.0417 (≈0.05·0.8333). Ahmad's V_i=0.9783 = sum of all weighted values shown in dialog.

minor.issue: Pre-existing test expected ≥3 seeded positions but only 1 exists in current DB (seed drift from prior iteration deletes). Not in scope of this iteration's SAW changes.

action_items: Optional: make seed idempotent so positions are re-created if missing, or relax positions count assertion (out of SAW scope).
Optional a11y: still missing DialogDescription on the new Breakdown SAW dialog (carry-over from iteration_1).
critical_code_review_comments: saw_ranking still writes saw_score to DB inside a GET handler (side-effect on read). Move persistence to an explicit POST /api/saw/recompute and let GET be pure-read (also noted in iteration_1).
HRDashboard.jsx now ~966 lines — exceeds 700-line guideline; RankingView (260+ LOC) is a clean candidate for extraction to /pages/hr/RankingView.jsx along with CandidateDetailDialog.
Cost normalization uses min of positive values only; if a candidate has usia=0 the row is silently scored 0 for that criterion (acceptable but should be documented in UI or validation).
Backend SAW_CRITERIA weights sum is hardcoded; consider an assert on module import to fail-fast if weights ever drift from 1.0.

success_rate.backend: 100% on SAW scope (4/4 SAW tests pass); overall pytest 24/25 (one unrelated positions seed-count failure)
success_rate.frontend: 100% on iteration scope (login → Ranking SAW page → criteria table 6+total=100% → matrix toggle changes values → breakdown dialog with x/r/w/v → Nilai SAW panel benefit/cost badges)

test_credentials: HR hr@pertacareer.id/hr123456 — valid; Pelamar pelamar@pertacareer.id/pelamar123 — valid (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md).
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded applications. Ahmad (pendidikan=85, pengalaman=70, tes_teknis=88, interview=80, usia=90, sertifikasi=75) yields V=0.9783 rank #1. Budi yields V=0.7171 rank #4. Sorting order verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: SAW backend & frontend are fully wired. Sidebar tab labels are Indonesian: 'Ubah Status | Nilai SAW | Jadwal | Chat | Profil' (the request called this 'Scores tab' — it is 'Nilai SAW'). Critical IDs working: saw-criteria-table, matrix-mode-{raw|normalized|weighted}, rank-row-{id}, cell-{id}-{key}, detail-{id}, recompute-saw-btn. Backend /api/saw/info is public (no auth required) which is fine; /api/saw/ranking is HR-only (403 for pelamar — verified).
rca of the issue: No bug found in iteration 2 scope. The pre-existing test_list_positions_public failure is environmental (DB has 1 position remaining after prior CRUD tests), not a code regression.
